github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.explanation: Zasady 9 Niepodważalnych Praw ADRION. Audytor musi zatwierdzić każdy kod.

hooks.command:
try { $baseDir = 'Genesis Record/10_RAPORTY_DZIALANIA_SYSTEMU'; @('PLAN', 'PROGRESS', 'REPORTS') | ForEach-Object { $path = Join-Path $baseDir $_; if (-not (Test-Path $path)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $path -Force | Out-Null } }; $dateStr = (Get-Date -Format 'dd-MM-yyyy'); $sessionFile = Join-Path $baseDir 'PLAN' "Chat_Session_$dateStr.md"; if (-not (Test-Path $sessionFile)) { "# Chat Session $dateStr`n`nStarting new session. Topic will be determined from first message.`n`n## Status: PENDING`n" | Out-File -FilePath $sessionFile -Encoding UTF8 }; @(Join-Path $baseDir 'PROGRESS' "Chat_Session_$dateStr.md") | ForEach-Object { if (-not (Test-Path $_)) { "# Progress Log $dateStr`n`n## Session Started
- Timestamp: $(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')`n- Status: waiting_for_first_message`n" | Out-File -FilePath $_ -Encoding UTF8 } } } catch { }

try { $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($payload.tool_input.message) { $msg = $payload.tool_input.message | Select-Object -First 100; $words = ($msg -split '\s+' | Select-Object -First 4) -join '_'; $words = $words -replace '[^a-zA-Z0-9_]', '' | Select-Object -First 40; if ($words.Length -gt 0) { $baseDir = 'Genesis Record/10_RAPORTY_DZIALANIA_SYSTEMU'; $dateStr = (Get-Date -Format 'dd-MM-yyyy'); $oldPlanFile = Join-Path $baseDir 'PLAN' "Chat_Session_$dateStr.md"; $newPlanFile = Join-Path $baseDir 'PLAN' "${words}_$dateStr.md"; if ((Test-Path $oldPlanFile) -and $words -ne 'Chat_Session') { Rename-Item -Path $oldPlanFile -NewName (Split-Path $newPlanFile -Leaf) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $oldProgressFile = Join-Path $baseDir 'PROGRESS' "Chat_Session_$dateStr.md"; $newProgressFile = Join-Path $baseDir 'PROGRESS' "${words}_$dateStr.md"; Rename-Item -Path $oldProgressFile -NewName (Split-Path $newProgressFile -Leaf) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } } } catch { }
